comment: Thresholds for the automated plausibility panel of the lifecycle cost report (LIFECYCLE_COST_REPORT). Range checks yield WARN when outside; structural checks yield FAIL. Bounds are deliberately generous - they catch unit mix-ups and wiring mistakes, not modelling disagreements. Reviewable data, not code.

effective_price_ranges.comment: Implied effective year-1 price = (working + standing + capacity + co2) / bought quantity, in EUR per native billing unit (kWh / liter / ton).
